hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: Transforming ideas into code. Creating amazing digital experiences with modern technologies and elegant design.

about.title: About Me
about.name: Wesley de Carvalho Augusto Correia
bio: From the internet cafes of my childhood where I started working, to today, my journey is marked by a passion for technology and supporting businesses with IT solutions, technical support, and automation. I've worked as a freelancer, in the family IT company, and in industries such as gas and energy (Petrobras), tobacco (Philip Morris), legal, and critical financial infrastructure (Central Bank/Anbima/SELIC). This diversity has forged my technical versatility and strategic vision. Analytical and solution-oriented, I identify bottlenecks and create automations that generate measurable efficiency. I adapt easily to large corporations or dynamic contexts, standing out in creative solutions under pressure. More than executing, I understand contexts, propose improvements, and deliver value. I learn quickly, value collaboration, enjoy being useful and helping people, and seek challenges that combine innovation and business impact.

experience.title: Experience
experience.value: Experience in IT with support, development, and Governance. In addition to administrative experiences and legal and salesforce backoffice.

education.title: Education
education.value: Graduated in Law. Postgraduate degree in FullStack Java Development (completed in Feb/2026), MBA in Project Management (paused) and studying Computer Science (in progress)

projects.title: Projects
projects.value: FullStack development with Clean Architecture, SOLID, DDD and best practices (OWASP, ACID). System Automation and Modernization.

highlights.title: Real-time computer vision + LLM pipeline
highlights.text: architected a monitoring pipeline combining Computer Vision (Vision + YOLO) and LLMs via LangGraph and RAG, automating image analysis and insight generation while reducing manual operational inspection effort.

highlights.title: PDF ingestion, embeddings and semantic search
highlights.text: AI-assisted PDF catalog ingestion, embedding generation (Gemini) and indexing in pgvector/FAISS for semantic product search, enriching internal pipelines and AI agents.

highlights.title: Demand forecasting and inventory optimization
highlights.text: evolved predictive algorithms with Prophet (time series) for demand forecasting, inventory optimization, inter-branch transfers and substitute product suggestions, directly impacting commercial decisions and reducing stockouts.

highlights.title: Sankhya/Microwork ERP integrations
highlights.text: integrated the Sankhya (Microwork) ERP via API to automate reports, quotes and sales operational flows, eliminating recurring manual tasks.

highlights.title: B2B people & goals management platform
highlights.text: delivered full cycle on a B2B platform used by corporate clients — FastAPI backend + React 19 + Vite frontend — shipping evaluation cycles, OKR/goal management and workforce administration.

highlights.title: Slack and Microsoft 365 corporate integrations
highlights.text: implemented integrations with Slack and Outlook (M365) for real-time notifications and transactional emails, connecting the systems to the channels companies already operate daily.

highlights.title: Multi-cloud infrastructure and CI/CD
highlights.text: provisioned infrastructure as code on AWS (EC2) and GCP (Cloud Run), with automated SSH deployments, Docker Compose and GitHub Actions for continuous multi-cloud delivery.

highlights.title: Novo-Selic modernization (mainframe → Java)
highlights.text: worked on migrating a critical national financial-infrastructure system from mainframe COBOL to a Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.x + Angular architecture, with Oracle Database persistence.

highlights.title: End-to-end observability
highlights.text: implemented a full observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Spring Actuator, Micrometer, Blackbox Exporter, AlertManager), enabling metrics, healthchecks and SLA monitoring in a mission-critical environment.

highlights.title: Containerization and CI/CD on GitLab
highlights.text: containerized applications with Docker and structured CI/CD pipelines on GitLab, automating build, tests and deploy with strict branch versioning.

highlights.title: Oracle schema versioning
highlights.text: versioned Oracle schemas with Liquibase and SQL scripts, ensuring traceability and controlled rollback on a sensitive transactional database.

highlights.title: SharePoint and Power BI for C-level
highlights.text: built SharePoint webparts (JavaScript, HTML, CSS) integrated via SharePoint API and Power BI (DAX) dashboards for executive indicators, serving C-level demands (Central Bank and ANBIMA).

highlights.title: Management frameworks aligned with PDTIC
highlights.text: applied PMI, Agile, MPS.BR and CMMI frameworks on initiatives aligned with the PDTIC, standardizing processes and sustaining IT governance deliveries.

highlights.title: RPA architecture for Brazilian courts
highlights.text: built an RPA architecture with Python, VBA and Selenium for large-scale data extraction from Brazilian courts, integrating internal systems with judicial platforms and significantly reducing case-registration time.

highlights.title: Procedural diligence and judicial financials
highlights.text: structured the management of diligences, judicial deposits and court fees through automation, raising data integrity and the accuracy of the firm's operational indicators.

highlights.title: Commercial KPI automation
highlights.text: automated data collection, report generation and commercial KPI analysis with VBA/Excel and Salesforce, reducing the time spent on administrative routines.

highlights.title: SAP operation and operational management
highlights.text: worked with SAP and Excel for operational management, quality control and customer-service support — first exposure to a corporate ERP.

edu1.description: Postgraduate program focused on Full Stack Java development with emphasis on Spring and modern development practices.

edu2.description: Postgraduate in project management with a focus on Agile practices and PMI.

edu3.description: Bachelor's degree in progress in Computer Science.
